sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application No.256 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh Case 1. For orders on office objections 2. For orders on CMA No.2018/2024 3. For orders on CMA No.2019/2024 4. For hearing of main case 30.03.2026 Mr. Nadeem Iqbal, Advocate for the applicant Matter is pending for the last two years without any progress. On the last date learned counsel sought time and a fixed date was given. Today once again he seeks time. He states that even the impugned order placed in the present proceedings pertains to some other proceedings. Upon being queried, he affirms that no effort has been made to rectify the same since inception which is almost two years ago. In view of the foregoing, no case is made out to perpetuate this matter in the docket, therefore, in view of the judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. JUDGE JUDGE Asif
